program.name: Vapour
program.description: A game engine written in C, C++ and Python, made for personal use but open for modification.

root_project.name: Vapour
root_project.note: This IS the Root Project. It owes no upstream payments to anyone. All revenue-sharing payments from downstream forks flow upward to this project — but the sole contributor has filed an Opt-Out Declaration and is not currently accepting distributions. This may change; see opt_out_duration below.

contributors.name: KiwiOnGit
contributors.opt_out_note: Contributor does not wish to receive revenue-sharing distributions and does not wish to impose revenue-sharing payment obligations on direct downstream forks with respect to their share specifically. This opt-out does NOT prevent downstream forks from owing shares to other Accepting Contributors added to the Heritage Chain in the future. To revoke, KiwiOnGit must provide written notice — revocation takes effect the quarter following receipt.

a_commit_log_query.notes: Single-contributor project. Sole contributor is KiwiOnGit per commit history at https://github.com/KiwiOnGit/Vapour/commits/main

b_contributor_outreach.notes: Sole contributor is the project author. No external outreach required.

c_public_notice.notes: This CHL-COMPLIANCE.json is publicly available in the repository and constitutes the public notice.

network_use.note: If Vapour or any Derivative Work is deployed as a hosted service, SaaS, or API, update this field and ensure the source URL remains publicly accessible.
